subject: Fermi GBM trigger 150615574 is not a GRB
body:
A. von Kienlin (MPE) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 456068761/150615574 at
13:45:58.47 UT on the 15th of June 2015, tentatively classified as a GRB, is
in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to distant particles."
